  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Classroom
    Enum Class for Classrooms, has two additional properties - Building and Campus
    Controller
     
    Course
    Enum Class for Courses, includes additional properties: Credit Hours, Standing & Major
    Date
     
    Instructor
    Enum class for Instructors, has no additional properties
    International
    International class for all international students
    List<E>
    A generic list backed by a growable array.
    Major
    Enum class for Majors, includes additional properties: School
    NonResident
    Defines a NonResident student (base for TriState and International).
    NonResidentStudent
     
    Profile
    Class used to define Student Profiles Includes firstName, lastName, & date of birth
    Resident
    Defines a Resident Student
    Schedule
    Schedule is a list of Section objects.
    Section
    Represents one section in the schedule.
    Sort
     
    Student
    Defines a student in the system Includes student profile, major, and credits
    StudentList
    A list of Student objects backed by util.List.
    Time
    Enum class for class periods / time, includes two additional properties - Hour and Minute
    TriState
    Class for tri state students
